package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

// scenario for sqlx_select_large_slice_without_limit: sqlx.Select used on request paths without a visible LIMIT in the query.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule299NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario299Negative(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, ids []int) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	return db.QueryContext(ctx, "select id from orders where account_id = any($1) limit 100", ids)
}
